title: pelargonium × circumscriptum
intro: Pelargonium × circumscriptum, also known as the 'Herro', is a hybrid species within the pelargonium genus, which consists of a group of flowering plants commonly known as geraniums. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × circumscriptum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats.
